name: Dutch Oven Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 8 Carrots, pared and cut into 2-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and quarter the potatoes.
2. Peel and chop the carrots into 2-inch pieces.
3. Rub the pot roast with salt.
4. Melt shortening in a Dutch oven over medium heat.
5. Add the meat to the hot shortening and cook, turning once, until browned.
6. Reduce heat to low.
7. Pour barbecue sauce and apple cider over the meat.
8. Cover and simmer on top of the range or in a 325°F oven for 3 to 4 hours.
9. About 1.5 hours before the end of cooking time, add the carrots and potatoes.
10. At the end of cooking time, add the onions and okra.
